name: Chicken Casserole Ala Ruth
recipeInstructions:
1. Place broccoli in a well-greased 9 x 13 pan.
2. Cut the chicken into large pieces and spread over the broccoli.
3. Spread 1/8 inch pieces of cheese over the entire pan.
4. Mix soup with salad dressing and spread over the cheese.
5. Sprinkle sliced water chestnuts over the top.
6. Bake for 55 minutes at 350°F.
7. Cover the top with onion rings for the last five minutes, then bake for a total of 60 minutes.
